abilities.name: Xuanwu Staff
abilities.description: Fire a damaging water orb. Hold to control its trajectory and empower its explosion.
abilities.damage: 10 (direct hit bonus, uncharged) / 20 (splash, uncharged) / 40 (direct hit bonus, charged) / 60 (splash, charged)
abilities.dps: Rapid fire of uncharged orbs: 90.91 while firing (74.07 overall w/ reload) Perfectly timed charged orbs: 158.73 while firing (128.21 overall w/ reload)

abilities.name: Restorative Stream
abilities.description: Place a passive healing stream on an ally. Hold on the target to manually heal at an improved rate, consuming resource.
abilities.healing: 20 per second (passive) / 55 per second (bonus manual healing)
abilities.duration: 5 seconds (LoS timeout, passive) / 1 second (LoS timeout, manual) / 2 seconds (recharge delay)

abilities.name: Rushing Torrent
abilities.description: Ride water to move faster and jump higher.

abilities.name: Guardian Wave
abilities.description: Send a water wave forward that increases the amount of healing received by allies and knocks back enemies.

abilities.name: Tidal Blast
abilities.description: Protect an ally or yourself with water that detonates after a short duration. The explosion knocks down enemies and massively heals the host target.

minor.name: Overflow
minor.description: Gain 10 ammo and 50% healing resource when Rushing Torrent is activated.

minor.name: Balance
minor.description: When you deal damage with water orbs, increase Restorative Stream's passive healing by 30% for 2 seconds.

major.name: Ebb and Flow
major.description: Guardian Wave rewinds to its starting location. Has 50% less effectiveness while rewinding.

major.name: Falling Rain
major.description: Simultaneously control 3 water orbs that deal 60% decreased damage and have have 25% decreased empowered explosion radius.
